# Diabetes Exploratory Data Analysis
## Project Overview
The objective of this project is to explore the dataset using NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and Seaborn. We will analyze the correlation between key features (Pregnancy, Glucose level, BMI, Blood Pressure, Age, and Pedigree Function) and determine how they relate to the final outcome (i.e., whether a patient is diabetic or not).
## Tools Used
- Python
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Matplotlib
- Seaborn
- Jupyter Notebook
## Dataset Features
- Pregnancies
- Glucose
- BloodPressure
- SkinThickness
- Insulin
- BMI
- DiabetesPedigreeFunction
- Age
- Outcome
## Analysis Performed
- Data inspection
- Missing value analysis
- Descriptive statistics
- Histograms
- Boxplots
- Correlation heatmap
## Key Findings
- Glucose shows the strongest relationship with diabetes.
- BMI and Age also contribute to diabetes risk.
- Some columns contain suspicious zero values.
